title: 🚀 Deploy AiSyncapp to Coolify
description: Deploy AiSyncapp (Open-WebUI fork) to Coolify VPS at kvmvps.aisyncapp.com
details: Branch: aisyncapp | Build Pack: Dockerfile (NOT Nixpacks!) | Port: 8080 | Env vars: COMPUTER_USE_ORCHESTRATOR_URL, COMPUTER_USE_MCP_API_KEY
steps: Add resource: Public Repo = AlgoTech92/open-webui, Branch = aisyncapp

title: [ARCHIVED] Resolve Cloudflare WAF blockage (error 1010)
description: Cloudflare/Traefik blocking n8n/MCP connection to computer.algotechbuilds.io/mcp
details: Error: 1010 (Access Denied - WAF violation) | Endpoints: /mcp (Streamable HTTP), /sse (SSE) | MCP server spins up in Coolify but external access blocked
notes: From Drew: 'computer.algotechbuilds.io... Cloudflare is blocking access due to WAF violations i think' | Need to adjust Cloudflare WAF rules or Traefik config on VPS

title: Push open-webui-pipelines/ to aisyncapp branch
description: The open-webui-pipelines/ directory was moved into open-webui/ but is untracked in git. Need to add, commit, and push to aisyncapp branch.
details: Location: /opt/data/projects/open-webui/open-webui-pipelines/ | Branch: aisyncapp | May also need to add to .gitignore if not meant to be tracked
